decisions.rationale: calculateUserAiCoachingMode patches ai_coaching_mode_os alongside the list field, which bTIEN does not do. AC-2 only requires the list patch and passes; DASH-02 reads the preferred mode via readPreferredCoachingMode (last list entry), not the singular field. The extra patch is a harmless prototype convenience and does not block API-06-ai-confidence-level-trigger, which depends on coaching-mode assignment completing but does not consume ai_coaching_mode_os. Document or remove the singular-field write in a later polish pass if strict Bubble parity is desired.

resolveAiCoachingModes is exhaustively unit-tested (11 cases covering all seven bTIEN actions plus simplifier add). calculateUserAiCoachingMode is a thin orchestration layer (loadProfileRow → resolveAiCoachingModes → patchOnboardingAndResults) with no branch logic of its own; functional audit FV-2 and AC-2 pass. Integration tests for field extraction and patch payload are valid backlog but not in API-05 acceptance criteria and do not gate API-06.

Decompose ir_refs cite entity id bTIEN while the Bubble api key is bTIES; the implementer correctly located and ported the seven-action chain (review grounding 5/5, all ACs pass). This is decompose documentation clarity, not an implementation defect. A note that bTIEN lives at api/bTIES can be added in a future decompose pass without rewriting API-05 code.

summary: Review passed (ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, 0 blockers). 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. All critiques are low-priority gaps that do not violate ACs or block API-06-ai-confidence-level-trigger. Advance to API-06; deferred items are polish (singular-field parity), test coverage for calculateUserAiCoachingMode orchestration, and decompose ir_ref key annotation.
